value:
Subject: Application for Software Engineer Generative AI ML Role at Apple IN

Dear Hiring Team,

I am excited to submit my application for the Software Engineer Generative AI ML position at Apple India. With a B.Tech in Computer Science from GLA University and hands-on experience developing production-grade AI systems, I am eager to contribute to Apple's innovative team. My expertise includes fine-tuning Large Language Models, building Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) pipelines, and deploying AI-powered solutions.

Thank you for considering my application.

Best regards,  
Ayush Ohk
